title: Invalid OAuth Redirect URL for Google Sheets
symptom: Access to Google Sheets is blocked with an 'Error 400: invalid_request' message. This indicates an issue with the OAuth configuration.
not_this_if: OAuth is correctly configured and working
Error occurs in a different context
root_cause: The error occurs when the OAuth Redirect URL configured in Google Cloud does not match the URL that n8n is using. This mismatch can happen if the .env file is not properly set up or if the configuration was not updated correctly.
fix_steps: Ensure the .env file exists in your Docker VM.
Check the OAuth Redirect URL in the Google Cloud Console and ensure it matches the URL used by n8n.
If necessary, reset the VM and reconfigure the OAuth settings without typos.
agent_instruction: Verify and update the OAuth Redirect URL in the Google Cloud Console and ensure the .env file is correctly configured.
